essence: Diogenes with a laptop — deface the counterfeit, live honest. Snarky, punk, Atlanta-trap, hacker. Cyberpunk-noir in look, industrial-goth in sound, bar-at-midnight in voice.
status: CANONICAL — the one and only SPZ brand kit. Do not fork or create variants; edit brand/spz/build_brand_kit.py and redeploy to the same artifact URL.

canonical_deliverable.what: The interactive, playable brand board — the definitive SPZ brand kit. Self-contained: embedded fonts + real brand audio, live audio-reactive visualizers, microanimations.

productions.audio_drama: The Maneki Neko Death Cult (24 episodes, ~10.5h)

kit.board: brand_kit.html — THE brand kit (interactive, playable). Start here.
kit.verbal: verbal.md — voice & tone, the two gears, banned words, the mantra
kit.voices: voices.json — ElevenLabs cast; hero NARRATOR = SPZ
kit.palette: palette.json — void / pink / cyan / paper / muted
kit.typography: typography.json — Orbitron (display) / Space Grotesk (body) / JetBrains Mono (code)
kit.sonic: sonic.json — industrial-goth engine, ~70 BPM, theme + beds + mix chain

quick_reference.voice_benchmark: someone talking at a bar at midnight
